mapper.insert:
SELECT ISEQ$$_80822.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_TBL ( BOARD_NO, WRITER_ID, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_THUMB, MEMBER_NICKNAME, BOARD_STATUS, READ_COUNT ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{marketTitle}, #{marketContent}, #{productThumb}, #{memberNickname}, 0, 0 )

INSERT INTO STORE_BOARD_TBL ( BOARD_NO, MEMBER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, MARKET_TITLE, MARKET_CONTENT, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_THUMB, PRODUCT_STATUS, READ_COUNT, IS_DELETED, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, TRADE_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{memberId}, #{ctpvsggId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{marketTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{marketContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productPrice, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{productThumb, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productStatus, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 0, 0, SYSDATE, NULL, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT S.MARKET_NO AS marketNo, S.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, S.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, S.CTPVSGG_ID AS ctpvsggId, R.CTPV_NM AS ctpvNm, R.SGG_NM AS sggNm, CASE WHEN S.CTPVSGG_ID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE R.CTPV_NM || ' ' || R.SGG_NM END AS regionName, S.MARKET_TITLE AS marketTitle, S.MARKET_CONTENT AS marketContent, S.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, S.PRODUCT_THUMB AS productThumb, S.PRODUCT_STATUS AS productStatus, S.READ_COUNT AS readCount, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE_TBL l WHERE l.BOARD_NO = S.BOARD_NO), 0) AS likeCount, NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL c WHERE c.BOARD_NO = S.BOARD_NO), 0) AS commentCount, S.IS_DELETED AS isDeleted, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.TRADE_TYPE AS tradeType FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL S LEFT JOIN CTPVSGG_TBL R ON S.CTPVSGG_ID = R.CTPVSGG_ID WHERE S.IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY S.MARKET_NO DESC

SELECT S.MARKET_NO AS marketNo, S.BOARD_NO AS boardNo, S.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, S.CTPVSGG_ID AS ctpvsggId, R.CTPV_NM AS ctpvNm, R.SGG_NM AS sggNm, CASE WHEN S.CTPVSGG_ID IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE R.CTPV_NM || ' ' || R.SGG_NM END AS regionName, S.MARKET_TITLE AS marketTitle, S.MARKET_CONTENT AS marketContent, S.PRODUCT_PRICE AS productPrice, S.PRODUCT_THUMB AS productThumb, S.PRODUCT_STATUS AS productStatus, S.READ_COUNT AS readCount, S.IS_DELETED AS isDeleted, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.TRADE_TYPE AS tradeType FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL S LEFT JOIN CTPVSGG_TBL R ON S.CTPVSGG_ID = R.CTPVSGG_ID WHERE S.MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND S.IS_DELETED = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE STORE_BOARD_TBL SET PRODUCT_STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo}
UPDATE STORE_BOARD_TBL SET IS_DELETED = 1, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo}

UPDATE STORE_BOARD_TBL SET MARKET_TITLE = #{marketTitle}, MARKET_CONTENT = #{marketContent}, PRODUCT_PRICE = #{productPrice}, PRODUCT_THUMB = #{productThumb}, TRADE_TYPE = #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CTPVSGG_ID = #{ctpvsggId}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo}
mapper.select: SELECT C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO AS REVIEW_NO, S.MARKET_NO AS MARKET_NO, C.BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER AS MEMBER_ID, C.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS MEMBER_NICKNAME, C.BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, C.PARENT_COMMENT_NO AS PARENT_COMMENT_NO, C.COMMENT_GROUP AS COMMENT_GROUP, C.COMMENT_DEPTH AS COMMENT_DEPTH, CASE WHEN C.IS_SECRET = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_PRIVATE, C.BOARD_COMMENT_DATE AS CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT AS UPDATED_AT, 0 AS IS_DELETED FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL C JOIN STORE_BOARD_TBL S ON C.BOARD_NO = S.BOARD_NO WHERE S.MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_GROUP ASC, C.COMMENT_DEPTH ASC, C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL C JOIN STORE_BOARD_TBL S ON C.BOARD_NO = S.BOARD_NO WHERE S.MARKET_NO = #{marketNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_COMMENT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_COMMENT_TBL ( BOARD_COMMENT_NO, BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER, BOARD_NO, BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT, BOARD_COMMENT_DATE, UPDATED_AT, MEMBER_NICKNAME, PARENT_COMMENT_NO, COMMENT_GROUP, COMMENT_DEPTH, IS_SECRET ) VALUES ( #{reviewNo}, #{memberId}, (SELECT BOARD_NO FROM STORE_BOARD_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo}), #{reviewContent}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{memberNickname}, #{parentCommentNo}, NVL((SELECT COMMENT_GROUP FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL WHERE BOARD_COMMENT_NO = #{parentCommentNo}), #{reviewNo}), CASE WHEN #{parentCommentNo} IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE NVL((SELECT COMMENT_DEPTH + 1 FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL WHERE BOARD_COMMENT_NO = #{parentCommentNo}), 1) END, CASE WHEN #{isPrivate} = 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO AS REVIEW_NO, S.MARKET_NO AS MARKET_NO, C.BOARD_COMMENT_WRITER AS MEMBER_ID, C.MEMBER_NICKNAME AS MEMBER_NICKNAME, C.BOARD_COMMENT_CONTENT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, C.PARENT_COMMENT_NO AS PARENT_COMMENT_NO, C.COMMENT_GROUP AS COMMENT_GROUP, C.COMMENT_DEPTH AS COMMENT_DEPTH, CASE WHEN C.IS_SECRET = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_PRIVATE, C.BOARD_COMMENT_DATE AS CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT AS UPDATED_AT, 0 AS IS_DELETED FROM BOARD_COMMENT_TBL C JOIN STORE_BOARD_TBL S ON C.BOARD_NO = S.BOARD_NO WHERE C.IS_SECRET = 'N' ORDER BY C.BOARD_COMMENT_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT REVIEW_NO, TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BUYER_NICKNAME, RATING, REVIEW_CONT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_THUMB, NVL(CREATED_AT, CAST(REVIEW_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)) AS CREATED_AT, IS_DELETED, IS_PRIVATE FROM STORE_REVIEW_TBL WHERE TRADE_NO = #{tradeNo} AND IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY REVIEW_NO DESC

SELECT REVIEW_NO, TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BUYER_NICKNAME, RATING, REVIEW_CONT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_THUMB, NVL(CREATED_AT, CAST(REVIEW_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)) AS CREATED_AT, IS_DELETED, IS_PRIVATE FROM STORE_REVIEW_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY REVIEW_NO DESC

SELECT REVIEW_NO, TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BUYER_NICKNAME, RATING, REVIEW_CONT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_THUMB, NVL(CREATED_AT, CAST(REVIEW_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)) AS CREATED_AT, IS_DELETED, IS_PRIVATE FROM STORE_REVIEW_TBL WHERE SELLER_ID = #{sellerId} AND IS_DELETED = 0 ORDER BY REVIEW_NO DESC

SELECT REVIEW_NO, TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BUYER_NICKNAME, RATING, REVIEW_CONT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_THUMB, NVL(CREATED_AT, CAST(REVIEW_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)) AS CREATED_AT, IS_DELETED, IS_PRIVATE FROM STORE_REVIEW_TBL WHERE TRADE_NO = #{tradeNo} AND BUYER_ID = #{buyerId} AND IS_DELETED = 0 AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT REVIEW_NO, TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, MEMBER_NICKNAME AS BUYER_NICKNAME, RATING, REVIEW_CONT AS REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_THUMB, NVL(CREATED_AT, CAST(REVIEW_DATE AS TIMESTAMP)) AS CREATED_AT, IS_DELETED, IS_PRIVATE FROM STORE_REVIEW_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND BUYER_ID = #{buyerId} AND IS_DELETED = 0 AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STORE_REVIEW_TBL ( TRADE_NO, MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, RATING, REVIEW_CONT, REVIEW_THUMB, REVIEW_DATE, IS_DELETED, IS_PRIVATE, CREATED_AT, MEMBER_ID, MEMBER_NICKNAME, REVIEW_CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{tradeNo}, #{marketNo}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{rating}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewThumb}, SYSDATE, 0, 0, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{buyerId}, #{buyerNickname}, #{reviewContent} )
mapper.select: SELECT TRADE_NO AS tradeNo, MARKET_NO AS marketNo, SELLER_ID AS sellerId, BUYER_ID AS buyerId, CTPVSGG_ID AS ctpvsggId, TRADE_PRICE AS tradePrice, TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, TRADE_TYPE AS tradeType, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt, REVIEW_YN AS reviewYn, CANCLE_REASON AS cancleReason, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, BUYER_NAME AS buyerName, BUYER_PHONE AS buyerPhone, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, DELIVERY_MEMO AS deliveryMemo, INVOICE_NUMBER AS invoiceNumber, COURIER_CODE AS courierCode, SHIPPING_STATUS AS shippingStatus FROM STORE_BOARD_TRADEINFO_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo}

SELECT TRADE_NO AS tradeNo, MARKET_NO AS marketNo, SELLER_ID AS sellerId, BUYER_ID AS buyerId, CTPVSGG_ID AS ctpvsggId, TRADE_PRICE AS tradePrice, TRADE_STATUS AS tradeStatus, TRADE_TYPE AS tradeType, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, COMPLETED_AT AS completedAt, REVIEW_YN AS reviewYn, CANCLE_REASON AS cancleReason, RECEIVER_NAME AS receiverName, BUYER_NAME AS buyerName, BUYER_PHONE AS buyerPhone, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, DELIVERY_MEMO AS deliveryMemo, INVOICE_NUMBER AS invoiceNumber, COURIER_CODE AS courierCode, SHIPPING_STATUS AS shippingStatus FROM STORE_BOARD_TRADEINFO_TBL WHERE MARKET_NO = #{marketNo} AND BUYER_ID = #{buyerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STORE_BOARD_TRADEINFO_TBL ( MARKET_NO, SELLER_ID, BUYER_ID, CTPVSGG_ID, TRADE_PRICE, TRADE_STATUS, TRADE_TYPE, CREATED_AT, COMPLETED_AT, REVIEW_YN, RECEIVER_NAME, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_PHONE, ZIP_CODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, DELIVERY_MEMO, INVOICE_NUMBER, COURIER_CODE, SHIPPING_STATUS ) VALUES ( #{marketNo}, #{sellerId}, #{buyerId}, #{ctpvsggId}, #{tradePrice}, #{tradeStatus}, #{tradeType}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, 'N', #{receiverName}, #{buyerName}, #{buyerPhone}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{deliveryMemo}, #{invoiceNumber}, #{courierCode}, #{shippingStatus} )
